context: Checks whether the final artifact follows the ecto-migration instructions from the published Elixir Phoenix Skills plugin.

checklist.name: instruction-1
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Define the change** — Identify the exact schema modification required.

checklist.name: instruction-2
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Assess lock behavior** — Does the change acquire an ACCESS EXCLUSIVE lock? Estimate hold time relative to table size.

checklist.name: instruction-3
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Plan rollback** — Define the exact inverse operation for `down/0`.

checklist.name: instruction-4
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Classify the change:**

checklist.name: instruction-5
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **HARD GATE — Plan Approved:**

checklist.name: instruction-6
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: Generate migration: `mix ecto.gen.migration <descriptive_name>`.

checklist.name: instruction-7
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: All four steps must succeed without errors.

checklist.name: instruction-8
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: Run the full test suite: `mix test`.

checklist.name: instruction-9
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: Verify migrations run in test environment: `MIX_ENV=test mix ecto.migrate`.

checklist.name: instruction-10
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: Review for code quality and security concerns if the migration handles sensitive data.
